content: Next.js 16 Server Actions (called 'Server Functions' in docs): Define with 'use server' at top of async function or file. Receive FormData automatically from form action prop. useActionState(action, initialState) returns [state, action, pending] — note: pending is 3rd element (React 19). Action signature: async (prevState, formData: FormData). Call redirect() or revalidatePath() inside action after mutation. For RSC forms, server actions provide progressive enhancement by default (works without JS). Server Actions are NOT callable from external clients — use Route Handlers for that. Auth pattern in docs: const session = await auth(); if (!session?.user) throw new Error('Unauthorized'). In Pace: use getIronSession(await cookies(), sessionOptions) inside 'use server' action, same as route handlers. CRITICAL: session.save() and session.destroy() must stay in Route Handlers only — not in Server Actions per established Phase 1 pattern.
